scripts.build: rm -rf .evershop extensions/sample-extension/dist themes/sample-theme/dist && cd extensions/sample-extension && npx tsc && cp -R src/* dist/ && find dist -name '*.ts*' -type f | xargs rm -f && cd ../.. && cd themes/sample-theme && npx tsc && cp -R src/* dist/ && find dist -name '*.ts*' -type f | xargs rm -f && cd ../.. && evershop build
